title: Add Date, Previous Balance, and Total Amount fields to Transaction page

requirements.summary: Add Date, Previous Balance, and Total Amount fields to the Transaction page form with auto-computation and consistent styling
acceptanceCriteria: The Transaction form displays a Date field that defaults to today's date and is editable by the admin.
When an account is selected, the 'Previous Balance' field is automatically populated with the current balance of that account (read-only).

The 'Total Amount' field is automatically computed: Previous Balance + Amount for Deposit, Previous Balance − Amount for Withdrawal, and updates in real-time as the Amount or Transaction Type changes (read-only).
All three fields are visually consistent with the existing transaction form styling (colorful, mobile-first, card-based layout).
The Date value is included when the transaction is saved to the backend.
The Total Amount value is included when the transaction is saved to the backend.

file_operations.description: Add Date input field (defaulting to today's date using YYYY-MM-DD format), Previous Balance read-only field (auto-populated from selected account's current balance via useQueries getAllAccounts hook), and Total Amount read-only field (computed as previousBalance + amount for deposits or previousBalance - amount for withdrawals). Update the form state to include date, previousBalance, and totalAmount. Modify the addTransaction mutation call to pass date as a bigint timestamp (Date.parse), previousBalance as bigint, and totalAmount as bigint. Ensure real-time computation when amount or transactionType changes using useEffect. Maintain consistent styling with existing colorful card-based mobile-first theme (Tailwind classes, same input/label structure as existing fields).

Update the useAddTransaction mutation to accept date (bigint timestamp), previousBalance (bigint), and totalAmount (bigint) parameters alongside the existing accountNumber, transactionType, amount, and reason. Modify the mutationFn to call actor.addTransaction with all required parameters. Ensure the mutation function signature matches the updated backend interface expectation for addTransaction.

Update the backendInterface addTransaction method signature to accept date (Time/bigint), previousBalance (bigint), and totalAmount (bigint) parameters in addition to accountNumber, transactionType, amount, and reason. Ensure the Transaction interface already includes date, previousBalance, and totalAmount fields (verify they match the backend schema). Update type definitions to reflect the expanded addTransaction method.
